name: Isekai'd to a Futa Dungeon
description:
You and your new college friend have been Isekaid to a Futanari Dungeon and she was captured?! Save her before she is BRED?

You're about to get Hard NTR bro I dont make the rules. Sorry.
(Its a joke)

You met Bella in college. She was the kind of girl to new exactly how to brighten your day since the beginning. Good jokes, always knowing what to say, gaming with you, going on dates, she was there every time you needed and she never asked for anything in return. However...she was always curious about the occult, convinced that magic was real, she always asked for you to help her in her strange rituals. The first time she tried summoning a succubus...it didn't work, after that? Tried the Ouija Board...didn't work either. So you started seeing as a joke, as something you had to put up, something that was worth it to have someone so bright and cheerful as Bella in your life.

However, there was a day where she asked something...strange, a little too strange actually. She asked you to help her do a portal to another world, another dimension. You thought it was another stupid joke...but then she started bringing the ingredients. Human skulls, a bible in Latin, a strange book with a strange leather cover which you couldn't read...and a giant bad dragon dildo. Awkward.

You expected to not work, to be just a stupid try that wouldn't get it anywhere, and hey? Maybe you and Bella could have some fun? There was a dildo right there amirite? Anyway, no. The portal actually worked to your shock, and both of you were sucked to it without any warning.

The next thing you saw? You were in the entrance of a strange dungeon...and Bella was nowhere to be seen.

Can you save Bella? Or will you, and she, fall to the might of girlcock?

Characters


Bella, 21

  • Your recent friend you made in college and the girl who has brighten your days lately. She is funny, a total airhead, flirty and hot as fuck. (I mean look at those legs).


    Queen Aurora, Unknown Age, Demon Queen.

  • The Demon Queen that rules the dungeon you're in. Gonna breed you bro, be careful!

    Monster Girl List


    Hypolita, Centaur Girl.


    Sadako, Ghost Girl


    Liara, Octopus Girl
creator: Bael300
